opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin is raw and on fire. It burns so badly I can't even put clothes on or walk across the room.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A raw, burning, weeping rash in my groin and belly folds that stops me walking.

symptom_narrative.duration: 5 days, much worse in the last 48 hours
symptom_narrative.character: bright red, raw, burning and weeping skin in the folds
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: agonising burning; can't dress or walk
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both groin creases and under the belly fold
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: keeping the areas apart and dry
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: temporarily bed-bound from pain on movement

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: type 2 diabetes, not well controlled lately
recent chest infection treated with antibiotics

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: just finished amoxicillin-clavulanate for a chest infection

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: warm humid room; large body habitus with deep skin folds

objective_data_offered.value: bright red raw skin deep in the groin creases and under the belly, weeping and a bit smelly, with little red spots and pustules just outside the main red area
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot assess for deeper spreading infection or take scrapings
